name: hud_ui_text_label_constructor_copy_from
description: HudUiTextLabel::Constructor copies the HudUiElement base with CopyFrom, then clones the text buffer and label font/alignment fields.
known_limits: Depends on HudUiElement::CopyFrom, which is functionally accepted but still has byte-level field-copy scheduling/register-shape drift.

VC6 cl 12.00.8168 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?Constructor@HudUiTextLabel@@QAEPAU1@PBU1@@Z at 0x4bcc80 still fails: 62 unmasked mismatches, 8 relocation bytes masked, 10 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 103 bytes and the VC object symbol is 112 bytes. The remaining drift follows the inherited HudUiElement::CopyFrom byte-shape mismatch and local copy scheduling.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows HudUiElement::CopyFrom, strncpy of 256 text bytes, and copies of fontHandle, centerText, center bounds, and alignMode.
The native text-label smoke validates the constructor-copy path through copied base fields, copied text buffer, font handle, center fields, and alignment.
